title: EffectMaster
description: Effect Master is a lightweight, easy-to-use mod that controls mob effects.
body:
Effect Master is a lightweight, easy-to-use mod that controls mob effects.


```
/effectconfig
```
 - open config menu

![config menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c92792f3d73a780628f3191b8fdfd17f917865a.png)

Each effect (including those added by other mods) can be set to disabled, default, or persistent
